programme.title: Premier Padel Highlights 2026 - Malaga P1
programme.desc: Highlights from the Miami P1, held in Miami, USA, from 22–29 March. Staged at the Miami Beach Convention Center, this Premier Padel P1 event features men’s and women’s main-draw action through to the finals. As a P1 tournament, it offers 1,000 ranking points to the winners and a total prize fund of €479,068.

programme.desc: Your weekly motor/racing update - distilled into one half-hour programme. Mariano Navone (ARG) vs Quentin Halys (FRA) - ATP 250 Generali Open 2026
programme.desc: The Generali Open 2026 is an ATP 250 clay-court event held in Kitzbühel, Austria, from 20 to 25 July. Staged at the Kitzbühel Tennis Stadium and offering €612,620 in prize money, the tournament is one of the ATP Tour’s traditional Alpine stops, with players competing for the title on outdoor clay.

programme.title: Manchester City vs Crystal Palace - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last eight Premier League games against Crystal Palace since a 2-0 home loss in October 2021. Crystal Palace have scored exactly twice in each of their last four Premier League away games against Man City, though have only gone on to win one of those. The only visiting team to score 2+ goals in five in a row a

programme.title: Manchester United vs. Liverpool - English Premier League 2026/2027
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026
programme.desc: This is the second time Crystal Palace have faced the Premier League champions after having the title confirmed, with the Eagles drawing 1-1 with Liverpool at Anfield last season. Crystal Palace have lost six of their last seven Premier League games against Arsenal, with the exception being a 2-2 draw at the Emirates in April last season.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026
programme.desc: Aston Villa have won just one of their last 16 Premier League games against Liverpool, a 7-2 home win in October 2020. Liverpool have scored at least twice in 10 of their last 11 Premier League away games against Aston Villa, including the last eight in a row. programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams.
